description_long: This fountain features a circular cobblestone base with a raised, rugged stone structure at its center. The central structure is carved to resemble a rocky mound, with a prominent arched alcove on one side, possibly intended as a niche or water outlet. Atop the mound sits an ornate sculptural element, which appears to be a stylized stone urn or vessel with decorative flourishes and a pedestal. The stonework is weathered, giving the fountain an aged, classical appearance. The overall design suggests a blend of naturalistic rock forms and formal architectural ornamentation. The fountain is substantial in size and would serve as a striking focal point in a public square or park.
description: A large, circular stone fountain with a rugged central mound, arched alcove, and an ornate sculptural urn on top, all set on a cobblestone base.
description_view_0: The front view reveals the arched alcove at the base of the rocky mound, framed by the circular cobblestone platform and topped with the decorative urn.
description_view_1: This side view shows the solid, rocky texture of the mound and the urn above, with the alcove partially visible and the cobblestone base extending outward.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the full height and width of the rocky mound, with the urn centered above and no alcove visible from this angle.
description_view_3: This angled side view displays the mound's rugged surface and the urn, with the alcove just out of sight and the cobblestone base curving around.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain is topped with an ornate sculptural urn featuring decorative flourishes and a pedestal, adding a classical and artistic touch. The rocky mound is carved with naturalistic textures, and the arched alcove provides architectural interest.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is a wide, circular platform made of cobblestones, with no visible tiering or compartments. The rim is flush with the ground and the central mound rises directly from its center.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present on the fountain.
